texto: The present assault upon capital is but the beginning. It will be but the stepping-stone to others, larger and more sweeping, till out political contests will become a war of the poor against the rich, - a war constantly growing in intensity and bitterness.
explicacao: Citação de Stephen Johnson Field sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “The present assault upon capital is but the beginning. It will be but the stepping-stone to other…” articula sucesso, capital, inequality em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como inequality e politics.
